title: Paul Newlove
description: Great Britain & England international rugby league footballer
extract:
Paul Newlove (born 10 August 1971) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s.
He played as a centre, for Featherstone Rovers, Bradford Northern, St Helens and Castleford Tigers. He also won 20 international caps for Great Britain, and 7 caps for England, including at the 1995 Rugby League World Cup.
